cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The problem says that John is correct and today's date is June 19, 2019 (6/19/2019). We need to find the date one year ago from today, in the format MM/DD/YYYY. First, I need to figure out what date it was exactly one year before June 19, 2019. Subtracting one year from 2019 would take us to 2018. So the year part is 2018. The month is June, which is 06, and the day is 19. So one year ago would be June 19, 2018, which would be 06/19/2018. Looking at the options, option A is 06/19/2018. However, I need to check if there's any catch here. Sometimes when dealing with dates, leap years or other calendar quirks might affect the calculation. But since June 19th is not affected by leap years (leap years affect February), subtracting exactly one year would still result in June 19, 2018. Let me look at the options again.
